arguments.argument: draw_self() if showMyText>0 { draw_set_alpha(1) draw_set_font(fnt_NES) draw_set_halign(fa_middle) textDropShadow("PRESS UP TO BUY AN ENERGY DRINK#1000 INTERNETZ#RESTORES HALF YOUR HEARTS##PRESS DOWN TO BUY A TURBO SMOOTHIE#3000 INTERNETZ#FULLY RESTORES ALL OF YOUR HEARTS",x,y-120,helpTextInner,helpTextOuter,4) }
